texto: The vibrations on the air are the breath of God speaking to man's soul. Music is the language of God. We musicians are as close to God as man can be. We hear his voice, we read his lips, we give birth to the children of God, who sing his praise. That's what musicians are.
explicacao: Citação de Stephen J. Rivele sobre temas ligados a familia. “The vibrations on the air are the breath of God speaking to man's soul. Music is the language of …” articula familia, copying-beethoven, god em registro de familia, com relevância para contextos como god e music.
